steps.title: Connect the preposition
steps.content: The sentence says Kingston examines themes of childhood, womanhood, and Chinese American identity. The preposition of must attach directly to its object list without punctuation interrupting the connection.

steps.title: Reject interrupted phrasing
steps.content: A inserts a colon, C inserts a dash, and D inserts a comma between the preposition and its object. Standard English requires the plain preposition before the list. The answer is B.
